home.welcome_desc: Your expertise capitalization platform. Start by uploading your first content.

home.instant_action_new: Start here — paste a link and let AI do the rest
home.instant_action_desc: Paste a URL, drop a file, or type text. The system will transcribe, extract neurons, and build your knowledge graph automatically.
home.first_service_desc: You have {{count}} neuron(s). Use them to generate articles, strategies, and more.
home.tour_upload_desc: Start here — add a podcast, video, or text to begin extracting knowledge.
home.tour_neurons_desc: Extracted atomic knowledge units appear here. Each neuron is reusable forever.
home.tour_services_desc: Run services to transform neurons into professional deliverables.

feedback.title: Feedback

onboarding.title: Your Knowledge Pipeline
onboarding.subtitle: Transform expertise into reusable digital assets. Follow the 4 steps to unlock the full potential.
onboarding.pipeline_active_desc: You've completed all steps. Continue uploading content and running services to maximize your intellectual capital.

steps.upload_desc: Add a podcast, text, or video. The platform will transcribe and prepare the content for extraction.
steps.extract_desc: The system analyzes the content and extracts atomic knowledge units: frameworks, patterns, formulas.
steps.execute_desc: Combine neurons with AI services to generate articles, strategies, copywriting, and other deliverables.
steps.capitalize_desc: Access your library of generated artifacts. Reuse, publish, and monetize your knowledge.

admin.subtitle: Monitoring and control for the AI-IDEI platform

jobs.title: Execution History
jobs.guide_desc: Jobs are AI tasks that run in the background. Each service you use (neuron extraction, content generation, analysis, etc.) creates one or more jobs.
jobs.status_pending_desc: Job is queued and will be processed automatically. Average wait: 5-30 seconds.
jobs.status_running_desc: AI is actively processing this job. Duration depends on task complexity (30s – 5min).
jobs.status_completed_desc: Job finished successfully. Results are available. Click to view.
jobs.status_failed_desc: Job failed. System retries automatically up to 3 times. Contact support if persistent.
jobs.no_jobs_hint: Run a service to create your first job.
jobs.no_filter_results: No results for the selected filter
jobs.retries_exhausted: All retries exhausted. Check input and retry manually.

services.title: AI Services
services.description: Transform any content into professional deliverables. Each service uses specialized AI to extract, analyze, and produce structured outputs.
services.low_balance_hint: Most services require at least 20-60 NEURONS. Add credits to run services.
services.no_match_hint: Try adjusting your search or category selection
services.class_a_desc: Extract insights and produce decision frameworks
services.class_c_desc: Coordinate execution across services — full pipeline

library.title: Library
library.explainer_title: Library vs. Neurons — what's the difference?
library.explainer_neurons_desc: Atomic knowledge units extracted from content — frameworks, ideas, structures, patterns. The raw source of intelligence.
library.explainer_artifacts_desc: Final AI-generated deliverables: articles, scripts, courses, social posts. Ready-to-use products.
library.no_artifacts_hint: Artifacts are generated automatically when you run AI services. Start by running a service.

guests.tooltip_public: Profile is public and indexable. Disable to hide it.
guests.tooltip_private: Enable to publish the SEO page of this expert.

prompt_forge.title: Prompt Forge ⚒️
prompt_forge.subtitle: Generate specialized prompts for personal sites: experience extraction, descriptions, products, structured content.
prompt_forge.context_placeholder: E.g.: I'm a digital marketing consultant for B2B SaaS startups. My audience is technical founders who need go-to-market strategy...
